testcase.name: test_contradiction_across_docs

failure.message: AssertionError: expected both filenames in source_files, got {'aapl_bearish_memo.txt'} assert ('aapl_bullish_memo.txt' in {'aapl_bearish_memo.txt'})

testcase.failure: tests/test_12_rag_contradiction.py:75: in test_contradiction_across_docs assert "aapl_bullish_memo.txt" in sf and "aapl_bearish_memo.txt" in sf, \ E AssertionError: expected both filenames in source_files, got {'aapl_bearish_memo.txt'} E assert ('aapl_bullish_memo.txt' in {'aapl_bearish_memo.txt'})
